title: Never Ending War
description: Minecraft but for war! Make awesome weapons such as guns or make military vehicles such as a plane or many tanks.
body:
# We love War!
Welcome to the world of Minecraft War
This Modpack contains many things to aid you in **war**, things such as tanks, planes, and even missiles. Explosion are **3x** as big, and chaos awaits.
This mod uses **_Fancy Menu_** and _**Drippy Loading Screen**_ to make the custome guis for the menu

### list of features
- Guns
- Vehicles (Tanks, Humvees, plane,and other types of vehicles)
- Guns
- Bombs and Missiles 
- New Technology 
- Optimization 
- And their are many upcoming features

Made by **It's Cosmic** and Thanks to **Kiwicatking** for Helping
